evidence: Root-level files: protein_analysis_utils.py (imported by analysis/ scripts — high fan-in, appropriate at root), STANDALONE_APP.py (not imported anywhere — low fan-in but large standalone file), DisProt_release_2025_12.tsv (data file at root), scorecard.png (artifact at root), non_srp_cterm_30.csv and srp_cterm_30.csv (output data files at root)

analysis/ directory contains: canonical pipeline scripts (signalp_6_filter.py, Uniprot_TMD_search.py, tmd_count.py, non_srp_filter.py, srp_filter.py), demonstration scripts (demo_fixed_workflow.py, improved_analysis.py), and a stale exploratory script (analysis_test.py) — mixed roles without subdivision
app/ is well-organized: app.py, wsgi_pythonanywhere.py, requirements.txt — all related to web deployment, clear single purpose
IDR/ is well-organized: idr_analysis.py, nterm_analysis.py, requirements.txt — all related to IDR analysis, appropriate boundary
tests/ mirrors the production modules with test_ prefix files — appropriate structure
Output CSV files (non_srp_cterm_30.csv, srp_cterm_30.csv) at the project root create clutter; these should be in filtered_datasets/ which already exists
DisProt_release_2025_12.tsv is a data file at project root; raw_data/ directory already exists for such files

strengths: app/ and IDR/ are well-bounded directories with clear single responsibilities
protein_analysis_utils.py at root is justified: it is imported by both analysis/ scripts and is the shared utility hub
package_organization.issue_character: The main organization issues are: data/artifact files scattered at the root that belong in existing subdirectories (filtered_datasets/, raw_data/), and analysis/ mixing pipeline scripts with demonstration scripts and a stale exploration file.
package_organization.score_rationale: The three main subdirectories (app/, IDR/, tests/) are well-organized. The project root and analysis/ directory have organizational debt: output CSVs and data files are at the root despite dedicated directories existing, and analysis/ mixes production and non-production files. These are practical navigation impediments, keeping the score in the lower-middle range.

issues.summary: non_srp_cterm_30.csv and srp_cterm_30.csv (pipeline outputs) are at the project root instead of filtered_datasets/
evidence: non_srp_cterm_30.csv and srp_cterm_30.csv exist at project root
filtered_datasets/ directory already exists and contains similar output files (proteins_cterm_distance_30.csv etc.)
analysis/non_srp_filter.py writes to the working directory: close_cterm.to_csv(f'non_srp_cterm_{cterm_threshold}.csv') — relative path that lands at root when run from project root
issues.suggestion: Update analyze_non_srp_by_cterm_distance and analyze_srp_by_cterm_distance to write outputs to filtered_datasets/; move existing root-level CSVs there

issues.summary: DisProt_release_2025_12.tsv (a data input file) is at the project root rather than raw_data/
evidence: IDR/idr_analysis.py DISPROT_PATH: os.path.join(_HERE, '..', 'DisProt_release_2025_12.tsv') — path resolves to project root
raw_data/ directory exists and contains similar input files
issues.suggestion: Move DisProt_release_2025_12.tsv to raw_data/; update DISPROT_PATH in IDR/idr_analysis.py accordingly

issues.summary: analysis/ mixes canonical pipeline modules with demonstration and stale exploration scripts
evidence: demo_fixed_workflow.py and improved_analysis.py are demonstration/narrative scripts; signalp_6_filter.py and Uniprot_TMD_search.py are canonical parsers
analysis_test.py is an exploratory script using *_test naming but not collected by pytest
issues.suggestion: Remove analysis_test.py; create analysis/demos/ for demonstration scripts (demo_fixed_workflow.py, improved_analysis.py) to separate them from reusable pipeline modules

root_causes: Output files were written to the working directory (project root) by scripts that predate the filtered_datasets/ convention
Analysis scripts were added to analysis/ without a subdivision policy as the project grew
